heading: Requirement of matching funds for fiscal years subsequent to first fiscal year of payments
label: 300d–12 Requirement of matching funds for fiscal years subsequent to first fiscal year of payments
notes: Amendments2007— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section related to requirement of matching funds for fiscal years subsequent to first fiscal year of payments.Pub. L. 110–231993—Subsec. (a)(2)(A). substituted “section 300d–11(b)” for “section 300d–11(c)”.Pub. L. 103–183
amendments: Amendments2007— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section related to requirement of matching funds for fiscal years subsequent to first fiscal year of payments.Pub. L. 110–231993—Subsec. (a)(2)(A). substituted “section 300d–11(b)” for “section 300d–11(c)”.Pub. L. 103–183

children.label: A
children.text: for the second and third fiscal years of such payments to the State, is not less than $1 for each $1 of Federal funds provided in such payments for such fiscal years; and

children.label: B
children.text: for the fourth and subsequent fiscal years of such payments to the State, is not less than $2 for each $1 of Federal funds provided in such payments for such fiscal years.

children.label: A
children.text: the costs to be incurred by the State in carrying out the purpose described in ; orsection 300d–11(b) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: the costs of improving the quality and availability of emergency medical services in rural areas of the State.

children.heading: Initial year of payments
children.label: 3 Initial year of payments
children.text: The Secretary may not require a State to make non-Federal contributions as a condition of receiving payments under for the first fiscal year of such payments to the State.section 300d–11(a) of this title

children.heading: Determination of amount of non-Federal contribution
children.label: b Determination of amount of non-Federal contribution

children.text: a State may make the non-Federal contributions required in such subsection in cash or in kind, fairly evaluated, including plant, equipment, or services; and

the Secretary may not, in making a determination of the amount of non-Federal contributions, include amounts provided by the Federal Government or services assisted or subsidized to any significant extent by the Federal Government.
